message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as u1
participant "server" as s1
participant "user" as u2

u1 ..> s1 : 1 POST /sign-up with body: email and password

s1 ..> u2 : 2 Check email existence

alt [Email existed]
    s1 ..> u2 : 3 Error code
    u2 ..> s1 : 4 Error message
    s1 ..> u2 : 5 Email is available
    s1 ..> u2 : 6 Hash password
    s1 ..> u2 : 7 Store email and hashed password
    s1 ..> u2 : 8 Store complete
    u2 ..> s1 : 9 Success message
end

@enduml
